creator: rs@bytecamp.net
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #1)

# cd /usr/ports/dns/bind916
# edit Makefile (comment out MANPAGES_BUILD_DEPENDS)
# make config (deselect everything except MANPAGES)
# make configure
# cd work/bind-9.16.39
# make man
# file doc/man/*.?

troff only.

Note that building the documentation still requires sphinx.
